zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll於1433年9月10日出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾時，他的父親Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell21歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Somerville20歲。他於1453年4月9日與Isabel Elizabeth Stewart在蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾 安德 音尼沙艾爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1479年登記服兵役。他於1488年在英國蘇格蘭被列為he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv.。他去世於1493年5月10日在蘇格蘭培爾圖利巴迪享年59歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll于1433年9月10日出生在苏格兰阿吉爾格勒諾爾时，他的父亲Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell21岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Somerville20岁。他于1453年4月9日与Isabel Elizabeth Stewart在苏格兰阿吉爾格勒諾爾 安德 音尼沙艾爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1479年登记服兵役。他于1488年在英国苏格兰被列为he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv.。他去世于1493年5月10日在苏格兰培爾圖利巴迪享年59岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Colin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Diminutive form of the medieval name Col(le), a short form of Nicholas . The medieval name died out after the 14th century. In the 19th century Colin was reintroduced to England from Scotland, where it is an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Cailean, particularly favoured among the Campbells and the MacKenzies, which relates to St Columba ( see Callum ) as Crìsdean does to Christ and Moirean to Mary.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll was born on 10 September 1433, in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell, was 21 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Somerville, was 20. He married Isabel Elizabeth Stewart on 9 April 1453, in Glenorchy and Inishail, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. He registered for military service in 1479. In 1488, his occupation is listed as he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv. in Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 10 May 1493, in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 59, and was buried in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll est né le 10 septembre 1433, à Glenorchy, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Somerville, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Elizabeth Stewart le 9 avril 1453, à Glenorchy and Inishail, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1479. En 1488, sa profession de son indiquée est he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv. à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1493, à Tullibardine, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll am 10. September 1433 in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell 21 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Somerville 20. Er hat am 9. April 1453 in Glenorchy and Inishail, Argyll, Scotland Isabel Elizabeth Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er hat sich 1479 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1488 ist sein Beruf als he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv. in Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. Mai 1493 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll è nato il il 10 settembre 1433 nel Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Somerville, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Elizabeth Stewart il 9 aprile 1453, nel Glenorchy and Inishail, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1479. Nel 1488, la sua occupazione è indicata come he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv. nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 10 maggio 1493, nel Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland: イギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウ

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyllが1433年9月10日にスコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイで生まれた時，父Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbellは21歳，母Lady Elizabeth Somervilleは20歳であった。1453年4月9日にスコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイ アンド イニシャイルでIsabel Elizabeth Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1479年に兵役登録をした。1488年，イギリススコットランドでの職業はhe held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv.と記録されている。彼は1493年5月10日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアトゥリバーディンで59歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルムンキルムン パーイッシュ チャーチ アンド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Inveraray Castle, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 인베라라이
ko.Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmu: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬먼 킬먼 파리시 처르치 앤드 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll(이)가 1433년 9월 10일 스컷랜드 아그이 글렌르c히에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Somerville(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1453년 4월 9일 스컷랜드 아그이 글렌르c히 앤드 이니샤일에서 Isabel Elizabeth Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1488년, 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드에서 he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv.이었다. 그는 1493년 5월 10일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 툴리바딘에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬먼 킬먼 파리시 처르치 앤드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.10 September 1433–10 May 1493: 10 de setembro de 1433–10 de maio de 1493
pt.Lorne, Argyll, Scotland: Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.Inveraray Castle, Scotland: Inveraray, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll nasceu em 10 de setembro de 1433, em Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Somerville, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Elizabeth Stewart em 9 de abril de 1453, em Glenorchy and Inishail, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1479. Em 1488, sua profissão aparece como he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv. em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1493, em Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Inveraray Castle, Scotland: инвирареи, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmu: килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll родился 10 сентября 1433 г. в местности гленорчи, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Somerville, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Elizabeth Stewart 9 апреля 1453 г. в местности гленорчи анд аинишеил, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. В 1479 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1488 годуработал по профессии he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 10 мая 1493 г. в местности туллибардаин, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll nació el 10 de septiembre de 1433, en Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Somerville, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabel Elizabeth Stewart el 9 de abril de 1453, en Glenorchy and Inishail, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1479. En 1488, su ocupación registrada era he held the office of chancellor [scotland] between june 1488 and 1493, reinstated by king james iv. en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1493, en Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
